summary: Casos/Incidencias module RETEST completed successfully. All frontend flows working after fix. Resident: Cases tab visible in bottom nav, can create cases, view details, add comments. Admin: /admin/casos page loads with stats, case list, detail dialog with status actions and comments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Casos/Incidencias module fully integrated and working. Resident can access via Cases tab in bottom nav. Admin can manage cases at /admin/casos.

resident_flows: Cases tab visible in bottom navigation (5 tabs: Emergency, Visits, Reservations, Cases, Profile)
Clicking Cases tab shows 'My Cases' list with 'Report' button
Create case dialog opens with title, description, category, priority fields
Case creation works - toast shows 'Case created successfully'
Case detail dialog opens showing status, priority, description, comments
Resident can add comments to open cases
admin_flows: /admin/casos page loads with stats cards (Total, Abiertos, En progreso, Cerrados, Urgentes)
Case list displays with status and priority badges
Case detail dialog opens with full case info
Status change buttons available (Abierto, En revisión, En progreso, Cerrado, Rechazado)
Comment input with internal note checkbox available

fix_verification.issue: Casos tab was added to wrong file (ResidentUI.js instead of ResidentHome.jsx)
fix_verification.fix_applied: CasosResident imported in ResidentHome.jsx, 'casos' added to TAB_ORDER, Casos module container added, ClipboardList icon added to ResidentLayout.jsx nav
